title: Blue's Cobblemon Utilities
description: A Cobblemon datapack addon that adds an item to change various status of a Pokemon.
body:
### A Cobblemon datapack addon that adds various item to change the status of a Pokemon.

**This addon doubles as both a datapack and a resource pack!**

Please install it in both your resourcepack folder and your world's datapack folder!

Currently can change the **__shiny status,__** **__gender__** and **__Regional form__** of a Pokemon.



**__Shift while holding an item__** to change the Pokemon in your first party slot!

Should work fine with Cobblemon 1.7, but if there's any issues please contact me through the discord link!

<details>
<summary>How to Configure</summary>

You can configure by using the UI accesible via running the command, `/function bcu:settings`
When an item is disabled, it will refund its ingredients upon use. (All features are enabled by default!)
![Settings UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HMbKoqXZ/images/9b382448e2c997649f5a58f844e5a420a7a1a80c.png)
</details>

### Commands

<details>
<summary>Show Commands</summary>

- Open the Settings UI `/function bcu:settings`
- Give yourself an item from this datapack `/function bcu:give/<item name>`
- Give yourself a stack of items from this datapack `/function bcu:give/<item name>/64`

</details>

### Planned updates
- Regional Bias Changer
- Cobblemon Size Variant Support
